translations.en: We’re waiting for the ambassador in front of the hotel.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al embajador frente al hotel.
translations.de: Wir warten vor dem Hotel auf den Botschafter.
translations.ko: 우리는 호텔 앞에서 대사를 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在酒店门口等大使。
translations.yue: 我哋喺酒店門口等緊大使。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o embaixador em frente ao hotel.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ đại sứ trước khách sạn.
translations.nl: We wachten op de ambassadeur voor het hotel.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо на посла перед готелем.
translations.hu: A nagykövetet várjuk a szálloda előtt.
translations.hi: हम होटल के सामने राजदूत का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε τον πρέσβη μπροστά από το ξενοδοχείο.
translations.nb: Vi venter på ambassadøren foran hotellet.
translations.id: Kami menunggu duta besar di depan hotel.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på ambassadören framför hotellet.
translations.da: Vi venter på ambassadøren foran hotellet.
translations.ja: 私たちはホテルの前で大使を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun with generic value (often used for 'we' in spoken French); here the subject of the verb 'attend'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite noun phrase with elided article 'l'' before a vowel-initial noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite noun phrase with elided article due to mute h; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Tu connais l'ambassadeur de ce pays.

translations.fr: Tu connais l'ambassadeur de ce pays.
translations.es: Conoces al embajador de este país.
translations.de: Du kennst den Botschafter dieses Landes.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识这个国家的大使。
translations.pt: Você conhece o embaixador deste país.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את השגריר של המדינה הזאת.
translations.vi: Bạn biết đại sứ của quốc gia này.
translations.nl: Je kent de ambassadeur van dit land.
translations.hu: Ismered ennek az országnak a nagykövetét.
translations.hi: तुम इस देश के राजदूत को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις τον πρέσβη αυτής της χώρας.
translations.nb: Du kjenner ambassadøren for dette landet.
translations.id: Kamu mengenal duta besar negara ini.
translations.sv: Du känner det här landets ambassadör.
translations.ro: Îl cunoști pe ambasadorul acestei țări.
translations.ja: あなたはこの国の大使を知っている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'connais'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite noun phrase with elided article; masculine singular; direct object of 'connais'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement ('ce pays').
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'pays'; masculine singular.
Noun; masculine; complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Nous avons croisé un ambassadeur au musée.
sentences.reading: /nu za.vɔ̃ kʁwa.ze œ̃ ɑ̃.ba.sa.dœʁ o my.ze/

translations.fr: Nous avons croisé un ambassadeur au musée.
translations.ipa: /nu za.vɔ̃ kʁwa.ze œ̃ ɑ̃.ba.sa.dœʁ o my.ze/
translations.en: We ran into an ambassador at the museum.
translations.es: Nos encontramos con un embajador en el museo.
translations.de: Wir sind im Museum einem Botschafter begegnet.
translations.it: Abbiamo incontrato un ambasciatore al museo.
translations.ko: 우리는 박물관에서 한 대사를 우연히 마주쳤다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在博物馆遇到了一位大使。
translations.yue: 我哋喺博物館遇到咗一位大使。
translations.ru: Мы случайно встретили в музее посла.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tình cờ gặp một vị đại sứ ở bảo tàng.
translations.nl: We kwamen in het museum een ambassadeur tegen.
translations.uk: Ми випадково зустріли посла в музеї.
translations.hi: हम संग्रहालय में एक राजदूत से टकरा गए.
translations.pl: W muzeum natknęliśmy się na ambasadora.
translations.nb: Vi støtte på en ambassadør på museet.
translations.id: Kami bertemu seorang duta besar di museum.
translations.sv: Vi stötte på en ambassadör på museet.
translations.ro: Ne-am întâlnit cu un ambasador la muzeu.
translations.cs: V muzeu jsme narazili na jednoho velvyslance.
translations.da: Vi stødte på en ambassadør på museet.
translations.ja: 私たちは博物館で大使にばったり会いました。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; forms the passé composé with 'croisé'.
Past participle of the lexical verb; with 'avons' forms the compound past; here no agreement since the direct object follows.
Indefinite article; masculine singular; determiner of 'ambassadeur'.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'croisé'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces the locative complement.
Noun; masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' indicating location.

translations.en: I’d like to meet the ambassador someday.
translations.es: Me gustaría conocer al embajador algún día.
translations.de: Ich würde den Botschafter gerne irgendwann treffen.
translations.it: Mi piacerebbe incontrare l'ambasciatore un giorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想有一天见见那位大使。
translations.yue: 我想有一日見吓嗰位大使。
translations.ru: Мне бы хотелось когда-нибудь встретиться с послом.
translations.pt: Gostaria de conhecer o embaixador um dia.
translations.he: הייתי רוצה לפגוש את השגריר יום אחד.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn một ngày nào đó gặp vị đại sứ.
translations.ar: أود أن ألتقي السفير يومًا ما.
translations.nl: Ik zou de ambassadeur graag eens ontmoeten.
translations.uk: Мені б хотілося колись зустрітися з послом.
translations.hi: मैं किसी दिन राजदूत से मिलना चाहूँगा.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα κάποια μέρα να συναντήσω τον πρέσβη.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne møte ambassadøren en dag.
translations.id: Saya ingin suatu hari bertemu dengan duta besar.
translations.sv: Jag skulle gärna vilja träffa ambassadören någon dag.
translations.ro: Mi-ar plăcea să îl întâlnesc pe ambasador într-o zi.
translations.cs: Rád bych se někdy setkal s velvyslancem.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne møde ambassadøren en dag.
translations.ja: いつか大使に会ってみたいです。

tokens.explanation: Verb in the conditional, 1st person singular; subject clitic 'j'' (elided 'je') is attached; governs the infinitive 'rencontrer'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'J'aimerais'; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite noun phrase with elided article; masculine singular; direct object of 'rencontrer'.
Indefinite article; here used with temporal noun to mean 'one day/someday'; determiner of 'jour'.
Common noun; masculine; adverbial time complement in the phrase 'un jour'.
